global_description: A small, sleek waterfowl with a distinctive fan-shaped crest. The male features a striking black and white head with a large white patch, contrasting with a chestnut brown body and black back. The female is more subdued with a grayish-brown body and a cinnamon-brown crest.
discriminative_attributes: Black and white head with large white patch

part_details.head: Male has a black and white head with a large white patch; female has a cinnamon-brown crest.
part_details.crest: Fan-shaped, prominent on both sexes, more colorful in males.
part_details.body: Male has chestnut brown body; female is grayish-brown.
part_details.back: Black in males, blending into the body color.

spatial_relations: The fan-shaped crest is positioned on top of the head.
The black and white head contrasts with the chestnut brown body.
The black back extends from the head to the tail.
